stem: During development a programmer carries out both iterative testing and final testing.
model_answer: Iterative testing happens as each module or feature is written: the programmer tests that part, finds bugs and fixes them before moving on. Final testing happens once the whole program is complete: the full system is tested against the original requirements to check that all parts work together and the program is ready to release. Together they reduce bugs in delivered software.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Compare iterative testing and final testing.

mark_points.text: iterative testing happens as each part/module is being developed
final testing happens once the whole program is complete
final testing checks the system against the original requirements / that modules work together
accepted_alternatives: checks the finished program meets the spec
